name: sudoku-solver
description: Full-stack Sudoku Solver with C++ engine

scripts.install-all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.server: npm run build-engine && cd server && node server.js
scripts.dev: npm run build-engine && concurrently "cd server && node server.js" "npm run client"
scripts.start: npm run build-engine && concurrently "cd server && node server.js" "npm run client"
